mapper.insert: insert into worker(name, phone, password, gender, skill_desc, service_status, latitude, longitude, rating, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name},#{phone},#{password},#{gender},#{skillDesc},#{serviceStatus},#{latitude} ,#{longitude},#{rating},#{status},#{createTime},#{updateTime})
mapper.select: select w.*, (select count(*) from service_order where worker_id=w.id and order_status=3) as totalCompleted, (select count(*) from service_order where worker_id=w.id and order_status=3 and DATE(finish_service_time) = CURDATE()) as todayCompleted from worker w where w.id=#{workerId}
